name: Tan Glass Table Lamp - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Decorate and illuminate your space in modern style with this Glass Table Lamp from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This accent table lamp features a ribbed glass base that complements the tan empire shade for a gorgeous look you'll love. Designed with an on/off light setting with a base turn knob rotary switch for easy operation, you can add this lamp to your home office or living room to study, work and read in style.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
